name: Loophole
author: Ahmad Othman Ammar Adi (OthmanAdi)
description: Runs an in-process MCP server on loopback so MCP clients like Claude can read and edit the open Live Set, with every write grouped into one undo step. Also registers five right-click commands: Lock to Scale, Humanize, Gain Stage Doctor, Build Arrangement from Session, and Clean Up Set.
notes: No prebuilt .ablx published yet — build from the source repo.
